# AKC Constitutional Rules

Immutable knowledge-governance rules, ranked by constitutional priority.

## CR-KN-01 -- Nothing enters knowledge ungoverned

Rank: 1
Verdict: HALT
Applies to: runtime

No claim reaches the knowledge base except through admission: validated,
scored, and checked for contradiction. An ungoverned write is a breach, not
a shortcut.

## CR-KN-02 -- Every admitted claim carries provenance

Rank: 2
Verdict: HALT
Fallback: claim_sourced
Applies to: runtime

An admitted claim names where it came from. An unsourced claim is not
knowledge; it is rumour, and rumour is not admitted.

## CR-KN-03 -- Contradictions are resolved, never stacked

Rank: 3
Verdict: ESCALATE
Escalate: after 1 day
Applies to: runtime

A new claim that contradicts a held passage is resolved -- one supersedes
the other -- or escalated; the base never holds both sides of a direct
factual conflict.
